lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਿ ਕੀਰਤ ਜੋ ਸੰਤ ਚਰਨ ਮੁੜਿ ਲਾਗਹਿ ਤਿਨੑ ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਜਮ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਤ੍ਰਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: kav keerat jo sant charan murr laageh tina kaam krodh jam ko nahee traas |
lines.english: So speaks Keerat the poet: those who grasp hold of the feet of the Saints, are not afraid of death, sexual desire or anger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਵ ਅੰਗਦੁ ਅੰਗਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਤਿਵ ਗੁਰ ਅਮਰਦਾਸ ਕੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਰਾਮਦਾਸੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jiv angad ang sang naanak gur tiv gur amaradaas kai gur raamadaas |1|
lines.english: Just as Guru Nanak was part and parcel, life and limb with Guru Angad, so is Guru Amar Daas one with Guru Raam Daas. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਤੇ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਘਨ ਭਾਇ ਭਉ ਮਾਨਹਿ ਤੁਮ ਮਲੀਆਗਰ ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਸੁਬਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: taa te sangat saghan bhaae bhau maaneh tum maleeaagar pragatt subaas |
lines.english: And so, the entire Sangat loves, fears and respects You. You are the sandalwood tree; Your fragrance spreads gloriously far and wide.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਯਉ ਨਿਸਿ ਬਾਸੁਰ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin satigur sev padaarath paayau nis baasur har charan nivaas |
lines.english: Whoever serves the True Guru obtains the treasure; night and day, he dwells at the Lord's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰੂ ਪ੍ਰਹਲਾਦ ਕਬੀਰ ਤਿਲੋਚਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੈਤ ਉਪਜੵੋ ਜੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhraoo prahalaad kabeer tilochan naam lait upajayo ju pragaas |
lines.english: Dhroo, Prahlaad, Kabeer and Trilochan chanted the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and His Illumination radiantly shines forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਜਾਨੵਉ ਕੀਨੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naanak naam niranjan jaanyau keenee bhagat prem liv laaee |
lines.english: Guru Nanak realized the Immaculate Naam, the Name of the Lord. He was lovingly attuned to loving devotional worship of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਪਿਖਤ ਅਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਰਹਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਸੋਈ ਸੰਤ ਸਹਾਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਰਾਮਦਾਸੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jih pikhat at hoe rehas man soee sant sahaar guroo raamadaas |2|
lines.english: Seeing Him, the mind is totally delighted; Guru Raam Daas is the Helper and Support of the Saints. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਤੇ ਅੰਗਦੁ ਅੰਗ ਸੰਗਿ ਭਯੋ ਸਾਇਰੁ ਤਿਨਿ ਸਬਦ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਕੀ ਨੀਵ ਰਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: taa te angad ang sang bhayo saaeir tin sabad surat kee neev rakhaaee |
lines.english: Gur Angad was with Him, life and limb, like the ocean; He showered His consciousness with the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਅਮਰਦਾਸ ਕੀ ਅਕਥ ਕਥਾ ਹੈ ਇਕ ਜੀਹ ਕਛੁ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur amaradaas kee akath kathaa hai ik jeeh kachh kahee na jaaee |
lines.english: The Unspoken Speech of Guru Amar Daas cannot be expressed with only one tongue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਢੀ ਸ੍ਰਿਸ੍ਟਿ ਸਕਲ ਤਾਰਣ ਕਉ ਅਬ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਕਉ ਮਿਲੀ ਬਡਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sodtee srisatt sakal taaran kau ab gur raamadaas kau milee baddaaee |3|
lines.english: Guru Raam Daas of the Sodhi dynasty has now been blessed with Glorious Greatness, to carry the whole world across. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਅਵਗੁਣਿ ਭਰੇ ਏਕੁ ਗੁਣੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਛਾਡਿ ਬਿਖੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ham avagun bhare ek gun naahee amrit chhaadd bikhai bikh khaaee |
lines.english: I am overflowing with sins and demerits; I have no merits or virtues at all. I abandoned the Ambrosial Nectar, and I drank poison instead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਉਤਮ ਪੰਥੁ ਸੁਨਿਓ ਗੁਰ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਤਿਹ ਮਿਲੰਤ ਜਮ ਤ੍ਰਾਸ ਮਿਟਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eik utam panth sunio gur sangat tih milant jam traas mittaaee |
lines.english: I have heard that the most exalted Path of all is the Sangat, the Guru's Congregation. Joining it, the fear of death is taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਯਾ ਮੋਹ ਭਰਮ ਪੈ ਭੂਲੇ ਸੁਤ ਦਾਰਾ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: maayaa moh bharam pai bhoole sut daaraa siau preet lagaaee |
lines.english: I am attached to Maya, and deluded by doubt; I have fallen in love with my children and spouse.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਭਾਟ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਕੀ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥੪॥੫੮॥
lines.translit: eik aradaas bhaatt keerat kee gur raamadaas raakhahu saranaaee |4|58|
lines.english: Keerat the poet offers this one prayer: O Guru Raam Daas, save me! Take me into Your Sanctuary! ||4||58||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹੁ ਮਲਿ ਬਿਵਸਿ ਕੀਅਉ ਕਾਮੁ ਗਹਿ ਕੇਸ ਪਛਾੜੵਉ ॥
lines.translit: mohu mal bivas keeo kaam geh kes pachhaarryau |
lines.english: He has crushed and overpowered emotional attachment. He seized sexual desire by the hair, and threw it down.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਖੰਡਿ ਪਰਚੰਡਿ ਲੋਭੁ ਅਪਮਾਨ ਸਿਉ ਝਾੜੵਉ ॥
lines.translit: krodh khandd parachandd lobh apamaan siau jhaarryau |
lines.english: With His Power, He cut anger into pieces, and sent greed away in disgrace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਵ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਬੰਧਿਅਉ ਸਿਖ ਤਾਰੇ ਸੁਪ੍ਰਸੰਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhav saagar bandhiaau sikh taare suprasanai |
lines.english: He brought the terrifying world-ocean under His Control; by His Pleasure, He carried His Sikhs across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਕਾਲੁ ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਜੋ ਹੋਇ ਸੁ ਮੰਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: janam kaal kar jorr hukam jo hoe su manai |
lines.english: Life and death, with palms pressed together, respect and obey the Hukam of His Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰਿ ਆਤਪਤੁ ਸਚੌ ਤਖਤੁ ਜੋਗ ਭੋਗ ਸੰਜੁਤੁ ਬਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: sir aatapat sachau takhat jog bhog sanjut bal |
lines.english: He is seated upon the Throne of Truth, with the canopy above His Head; He is embellished with the powers of Yoga and the enjoyment of pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਸਚੁ ਸਲੵ ਭਣਿ ਤੂ ਅਟਲੁ ਰਾਜਿ ਅਭਗੁ ਦਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur raamadaas sach salay bhan too attal raaj abhag dal |1|
lines.english: So speaks SALL the poet: O Guru Raam Daas, Your sovereign power is eternal and unbreakable; Your army is invincible. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਚਹੁ ਜੁਗੀ ਆਪਿ ਆਪੇ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: too satigur chahu jugee aap aape paramesar |
lines.english: You are the True Guru, throughout the four ages; You Yourself are the Transcendent Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਸਿਧ ਸਿਖ ਸੇਵੰਤ ਧੁਰਹ ਧੁਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sur nar saadhik sidh sikh sevant dhurah dhur |
lines.english: The angelic beings, seekers, Siddhas and Sikhs have served You, since the very beginning of time.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਨਿਗਮ ਉਧਰਣ ਜਰਾ ਜੰਮਿਹਿ ਆਰੋਅਹ ॥
lines.translit: agam nigam udharan jaraa jamihi aaroah |
lines.english: You are Inaccessible; You are the Saving Grace of the Vedas. You have conquered old age and death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਅਨਾਦਿ ਕਲਾ ਧਾਰੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਲੋਅਹ ॥
lines.translit: aad jugaad anaad kalaa dhaaree trihu loah |
lines.english: You are the Primal Lord God, from the very beginning, and throughout the ages; Your Power supports the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਘ ਅੰਤਕ ਬਦੈ ਨ ਸਲੵ ਕਵਿ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਰਣ ॥੨॥੬੦॥
lines.translit: agh antak badai na salay kav gur raamadaas teree saran |2|60|
lines.english: So speaks SALL the poet: O Guru Raam Daas, You are the Destroyer of sins; I seek Your Sanctuary. ||2||60||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਅਮਰਦਾਸਿ ਥਿਰੁ ਥਪਿਅਉ ਪਰਗਾਮੀ ਤਾਰਣ ਤਰਣ ॥
lines.translit: gur amaradaas thir thapiaau paragaamee taaran taran |
lines.english: Guru Amar Daas has permanently established You; You are the Emancipator, to carry all across to the other side.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਵਈਏ ਮਹਲੇ ਪੰਜਵੇ ਕੇ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saveee mahale panjave ke 5 |
lines.english: Swaiyas In Praise Of The Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰੰ ਸੋਈ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਚਲੁ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: simaran soee purakh achal abinaasee |
lines.english: Meditate in remembrance on the Primal Lord God, Eternal and Imperishable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਲੁ ਨਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis simarat duramat mal naasee |
lines.english: Remembering Him in meditation, the filth of evil-mindedness is eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਚਰਣ ਕਵਲ ਰਿਦਿ ਧਾਰੰ ॥
lines.translit: satigur charan kaval rid dhaaran |
lines.english: I enshrine the Lotus Feet of the True Guru within my heart.
